nodes.label: AI as summarisation and material creation tool
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help me summarise articles online or textbook chapter

nodes.label: AI as grading and feedback assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I also use AI to help me with grading

nodes.label: AI as collaborative iterative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as one-shot complete assessment tool
nodes.grounding_span: I will work more closely with the AI and focus on one area first

nodes.label: AI reliability in following instructions
nodes.label_negative: AI failure to follow instructions or reconsider
nodes.grounding_span: the AI was just echoing my thoughts and it did not look as if it was actually reading the submission again

nodes.label: Teacher's personal involvement in material creation
nodes.label_negative: Full delegation of material creation to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I like to set up glossaries and key term activities myself

nodes.label: AI adaptability to subject dynamism
nodes.label_negative: AI limitations in marking handwritten work
nodes.grounding_span: AI is great for helping find case studies in this field

nodes.label: Teaching efficiency and student engagement
nodes.grounding_span: turn quite a dry textbook chapter on variables and control flow into a set of engaging lessons

nodes.label: Assessment accuracy and fairness
nodes.grounding_span: the AI has marked an assessment really high however the student did not follow the initial instructions

nodes.label: Teacher's pedagogical clarity and ownership
nodes.grounding_span: I find it helps me with my teaching as I have had to put this together and I find I am clearer in my own delivery

nodes.label: Human connection in education
nodes.grounding_span: people will still want to talk to a real person and have that contact

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for lesson creation
nodes.grounding_span: AI made me feel really satisfied when I was able to work with it to turn quite a dry textbook chapter... into a set of engaging lessons

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to reconsider grading
nodes.grounding_span: the AI was just echoing my thoughts and it did not look as if it was actually reading the submission again

nodes.label: Proactive optimism about future AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I think I will increase my usage of AI as I become more confident in what it can do

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI in assessment due to reliability issues
nodes.grounding_span: I gave up with it and just did my own feedback

nodes.label: Systematic iterative decomposition of tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I will work more closely with the AI and focus on one area first

nodes.label: Proactive skill maintenance and continuous learning
nodes.grounding_span: I try to do as much training as I can, particularly on new developments and features in AI
